27	test -z "${ZBURH_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module burh multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
28	ZBURH_SOURCED=1
29	
30	######################################################################
31	# Internal Functions (zburh_*)
32	
33	zburh_kindle() {
34	  test -z "${ZBURH_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module burh already kindled"
35	
36	  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
37	  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.
38	
39	  # Enroll all BURH variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering
40	
41	  buv_regime_enroll BURH
42	
43	  buv_group_enroll "Connection Identity"
44	  buv_string_enroll  BURH_HOST        1  253  "IP address or hostname of the remote machine"
45	  buv_xname_enroll   BURH_USER        1   32  "Username on the remote host"
46	  buv_xname_enroll   BURH_ALIAS       1   64  "SSH alias and key filename (must match directory name)"
47	
48	  buv_group_enroll "Authentication"
49	  buv_string_enroll  BURH_SSH_PUBKEY  20 1024  "Full public key line (e.g., ssh-ed25519 AAAA... user@host)"
50	
51	  buv_group_enroll "Session Routing"
52	  buv_string_enroll  BURH_COMMAND      0  512  "Shell command for command= routing in authorized_keys (empty for direct shell)"
53	
54	  # Guard against unexpected BURH_ variables not in enrollment
55	  buv_scope_sentinel BURH BURH_
56	
57	  # Lock all enrolled BURH_ variables against mutation
58	  buv_lock BURH
59	
60	  readonly ZBURH_KINDLED=1
61	}
62	
63	zburh_sentinel() {
64	  test "${ZBURH_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module burh not kindled - call zburh_kindle first"
65	}
66	
67	# Enforce all BURH enrollment validations
68	zburh_enforce() {
69	  zburh_sentinel
70	
71	  buv_vet BURH
72	}
73	
74	######################################################################
75	# Public Functions (burh_*)
76	
77	# List available alias names as space-separated tokens
78	# Prerequisite: BURS kindled (needs BURS_USER), BURD kindled (needs BURD_CONFIG_DIR)
79	burh_list_capture() {
80	  zburs_sentinel
81	
82	  local -r z_user_dir="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/users/${BURS_USER}"
83	  test -d "${z_user_dir}" || return 1
84	
85	  local z_result=""
86	  local z_files=("${z_user_dir}"/*/burh.env)
87	  local z_i=""
88	  for z_i in "${!z_files[@]}"; do
89	    test -f "${z_files[$z_i]}" || continue
90	    local z_dir="${z_files[$z_i]%/*}"
91	    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_dir##*/}"
92	  done
93	  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
94	  echo "${z_result}"
95	}
96	
97	# eof

33	burh_validate() {

51	burh_list() {
52	  buc_doc_brief "List available BURH host profiles for current user"
53	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
54	
55	  local z_aliases
56	  z_aliases=$(burh_list_capture) || buc_die "No BURH profiles found for user: ${BURS_USER}"
57	  buc_step "Available profiles for ${BURS_USER}:"

64	######################################################################
65	# Internal: Constructor Helper
66	#
67	# Shared logic for all platform constructors.
68	# Args: host user moniker suffix command_value

70	
71	zburh_construct() {
72	  local z_host="${1:-}"
73	  local z_user="${2:-}"
74	  local z_moniker="${3:-}"
75	  local z_suffix="${4:-}"
76	  local z_command="${5:-}"
77	
78	  test -n "${z_host}"    || buc_die "host required (arg 1)"
79	  test -n "${z_user}"    || buc_die "user required (arg 2)"
80	  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "moniker required (arg 3)"

82	  local -r z_alias="${z_moniker}-${z_suffix}"
83	  local -r z_profile_dir="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/users/${BURS_USER}/${z_alias}"
84	  local -r z_profile_file="${z_profile_dir}/burh.env"
85	  local -r z_pubkey_file="${HOME}/.ssh/${z_alias}.pub"
86	  local z_pubkey=""
87	  local z_has_pubkey=0
88	
89	  if test -f "${z_pubkey_file}"; then
90	    z_pubkey=$(head -1 "${z_pubkey_file}")
91	    z_has_pubkey=1
92	    buc_step "Found public key: ${z_pubkey_file}"
93	  else
94	    z_pubkey="ssh-ed25519 REPLACE_WITH_ACTUAL_PUBKEY ${BURS_USER}@$(hostname -s)"
95	  fi
96	
97	  mkdir -p "${z_profile_dir}"
98	
99	  printf '%s\n' "BURH_HOST=${z_host}"           >  "${z_profile_file}"
100	  printf '%s\n' "BURH_USER=${z_user}"            >> "${z_profile_file}"
101	  printf '%s\n' "BURH_ALIAS=${z_alias}"          >> "${z_profile_file}"
102	  printf '%s\n' "BURH_SSH_PUBKEY='${z_pubkey}'"  >> "${z_profile_file}"
103	  printf '%s\n' "BURH_COMMAND='${z_command}'"    >> "${z_profile_file}"

105	  buc_step "BURH profile written: ${z_profile_file}"

182	######################################################################
183	# Command Functions — SSH Automation
184	
185	burh_ssh_config() {
186	  buc_doc_brief "Generate SSH config entries from all BURH profiles"
187	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
188	
189	  local z_aliases
190	  z_aliases=$(burh_list_capture) || buc_die "No BURH profiles found for user: ${BURS_USER}"
191	
192	  local -r z_config="${HOME}/.ssh/config"
193	  local -r z_begin="# --- BEGIN BURH MANAGED ---"
194	  local -r z_end="# --- END BURH MANAGED ---"
195	
196	  # Build managed section content
197	  local z_section=""
198	  z_section="${z_begin}"$'\n'
199	  z_section+="# Generated by buw-HWsc — do not edit this section manually"$'\n'
200	
201	  local z_alias=""
202	  for z_alias in ${z_aliases}; do
203	    local z_profile="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/users/${BURS_USER}/${z_alias}/burh.env"
204	    # Source directly — BURH not kindled, no readonly conflict
205	    source "${z_profile}"
206	    z_section+=$'\n'
207	    z_section+="Host ${BURH_ALIAS}"$'\n'
208	    z_section+="  HostName ${BURH_HOST}"$'\n'
209	    z_section+="  User ${BURH_USER}"$'\n'
210	    z_section+="  IdentityFile ~/.ssh/${BURH_ALIAS}"$'\n'
211	  done
212	
213	  z_section+="${z_end}"$'\n'
214	
215	  # Write managed section into config
216	  mkdir -p "${HOME}/.ssh"
217	
218	  if test -f "${z_config}" && grep -q "${z_begin}" "${z_config}"; then
219	    # Replace existing managed section
220	    local -r z_temp=$(mktemp)
221	    local z_in_managed=0
222	    while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
223	      if test "${z_line}" = "${z_begin}"; then
224	        z_in_managed=1
225	        printf '%s' "${z_section}" >> "${z_temp}"
226	        continue
227	      fi
228	      if test "${z_in_managed}" = "1"; then
229	        test "${z_line}" = "${z_end}" && z_in_managed=0
230	        continue
231	      fi
232	      printf '%s\n' "${z_line}" >> "${z_temp}"
233	    done < "${z_config}"
234	    mv "${z_temp}" "${z_config}"
235	  elif test -f "${z_config}"; then
236	    # Append managed section
237	    printf '\n%s' "${z_section}" >> "${z_config}"
238	  else
239	    # Create new config
240	    printf '%s' "${z_section}" > "${z_config}"
241	  fi
242	
243	  chmod 600 "${z_config}"
244	  buc_step "SSH config updated: ${z_config}"
245	  buc_step "Managed profiles: ${z_aliases}"
246	}

248	burh_verify_ssh() {
249	  buc_doc_brief "Verify SSH connectivity to a BURH profile"

257	    buc_success "SSH OK: ${BURH_ALIAS} -> ${z_result}"
258	  else

262	
263	burh_bootstrap_sshd() {
264	  buc_doc_brief "Bootstrap OpenSSH server on Windows via PowerShell from WSL"
265	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
266	
267	  command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null 2>&1 \
268	    || buc_die "powershell.exe not found — this command must run from WSL"
269	
270	  zbuhw_sentinel
271	
272	  local z_aliases
273	  z_aliases=$(burh_list_capture) || buc_die "No BURH profiles found for user: ${BURS_USER}"
274	
275	  buc_step "Bootstrap: OpenSSH Server on Windows"
276	
277	  # Step 1: Probe sshd
278	  buc_step "Probing OpenSSH Server..."
279	  local z_status=""
280	  if z_status=$(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Service sshd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Status' 2>&1); then
281	    z_status=$(printf '%s' "${z_status}" | tr -d '\r\n')
282	    buc_step "OpenSSH Server status: ${z_status}"
283	  else
284	    buc_step "OpenSSH Server not installed — installing..."
285	    powershell.exe -Command 'Add-WindowsCapability -Online -Name OpenSSH.Server~~~~0.0.1.0' \
286	      || buc_die "Failed to install OpenSSH Server (elevated terminal required)"
287	    buc_step "OpenSSH Server installed"
288	  fi
289	
290	  # Step 2: Write sshd_config from template
291	  buc_step "Writing sshd_config..."
292	  {
293	    echo "# Generated by buw-HWbs — BURH bootstrap"
294	    echo "Port ${ZBUHW_SSH_PORT}"
295	    echo "PasswordAuthentication no"
296	    echo "PubkeyAuthentication yes"
297	    echo "PermitEmptyPasswords no"
298	    echo "AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys"
299	    echo "Subsystem sftp sftp-server.exe"
300	    echo "Match Group administrators"
301	    echo "  AuthorizedKeysFile __PROGRAMDATA__/ssh/administrators_authorized_keys"
302	  } | powershell.exe -Command '$input | Set-Content -Path "C:/ProgramData/ssh/sshd_config" -Force' \
303	    || buc_die "Failed to write sshd_config (elevated terminal required)"
304	  buc_step "sshd_config written"
305	
306	  # Validate sshd_config
307	  powershell.exe -Command 'sshd -t -f "C:/ProgramData/ssh/sshd_config"' \
308	    || buc_die "sshd_config validation failed — check config syntax"
309	  buc_step "sshd_config validated"
310	
311	  # Step 3: Write authorized_keys from BURH profiles
312	  buc_step "Writing administrators_authorized_keys..."
313	  {
314	    echo "# Generated by buw-HWbs — BURH bootstrap"
315	    local z_alias=""
316	    for z_alias in ${z_aliases}; do
317	      local z_profile="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/users/${BURS_USER}/${z_alias}/burh.env"
318	      source "${z_profile}"
319	      if test -n "${BURH_COMMAND}"; then
320	        echo "command=\"${BURH_COMMAND}\" ${BURH_SSH_PUBKEY}"
321	      else
322	        echo "${BURH_SSH_PUBKEY}"
323	      fi
324	    done
325	  } | powershell.exe -Command '$input | Set-Content -Path "C:/ProgramData/ssh/administrators_authorized_keys" -Force' \
326	    || buc_die "Failed to write authorized_keys (elevated terminal required)"
327	  buc_step "authorized_keys written"
328	
329	  # Step 4: Set authorized_keys permissions
330	  buc_step "Setting authorized_keys permissions..."
331	  powershell.exe -Command 'icacls "C:/ProgramData/ssh/administrators_authorized_keys" /inheritance:r /grant "Administrators:F" /grant "SYSTEM:F"' \
332	    || buc_die "Failed to set authorized_keys permissions"
333	  buc_step "Permissions set"
334	
335	  # Step 5: Configure and start sshd service
336	  buc_step "Configuring sshd service..."
337	  powershell.exe -Command 'Set-Service -Name sshd -StartupType Automatic' \
338	    || buc_die "Failed to configure sshd service"
339	  powershell.exe -Command 'Restart-Service sshd' \
340	    || buc_die "Failed to restart sshd service"
341	  buc_step "sshd service configured and started"
342	
343	  # Step 6: Firewall rule (idempotent)
344	  buc_step "Checking firewall rule..."
345	  if powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Name '${ZBUHW_FW_RULE_NAME}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
346	    buc_step "Firewall rule already exists"
347	  else
348	    powershell.exe -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -Name '${ZBUHW_FW_RULE_NAME}' -DisplayName '${ZBUHW_FW_DISPLAY_NAME}' -Enabled True -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -Action Allow -LocalPort ${ZBUHW_SSH_PORT}" \
349	      || buc_die "Failed to create firewall rule"
350	    buc_step "Firewall rule created"
351	  fi
352	
353	  # Step 7: Loopback verify
354	  buc_step "Verifying loopback SSH..."
355	  local z_whoami=""
356	  if z_whoami=$(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no localhost whoami 2>&1); then
357	    z_whoami=$(printf '%s' "${z_whoami}" | tr -d '\r\n')
358	    buc_success "Bootstrap complete — loopback SSH: ${z_whoami}"
359	  else
360	    buc_warn "Loopback verify deferred (keys may need setup from client machine)"
361	    buc_step "Bootstrap structurally complete"
362	  fi
363	}
364	
365	######################################################################
366	# Furnish and Main
367	
368	zburh_furnish() {
369	  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
370	  buc_doc_env "BURD_CONFIG_DIR       " "BUK config directory (dispatch-provided)"

606

608	  local z_prefix="${2:-}"
609	  test -n "${z_scope}"  || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: scope required"
610	  test -n "${z_prefix}" || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: prefix required"
611	
612	  # Build lookup string from enrolled varnames for this scope

614	  local z_i

617	    z_known="${z_known}${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]} "
618	  done

621	  local z_unexpected=()
622	  local z_var
623	  for z_var in $(compgen -v "${z_prefix}"); do
624	    case "${z_known}" in
625	      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
626	      *) z_unexpected+=("${z_var}") ;;
627	    esac
628	  done
629	
630	  if test "${#z_unexpected[@]}" -gt 0; then
